title: Apuntes para una biografía imaginaria
overview: A man sets out to gather traces of what impressed him in his life. Over the years, he accumulates voices, music, images from distant countries, historical moments, and loved ones. Some of them are found objects, others he has made himself. At some point, he realizes that this labyrinth of fragments traces the image of his face.
